summary: Mobile/tablet redesign UI verification complete. All 15 features tested and PASS. Dark glass-morphism MobileTabBar with gold accents verified. Hero content vertically centered on mobile/tablet. Cookie consent dark glass styling confirmed. Floating button stacking correct. All pages have no horizontal overflow.

mobile_viewport_390px.cta_touch_friendly: PASS - All CTA buttons ≥44px height (56px measured)

tablet_viewport_768px.aura_no_overlap: PASS - AURA does not overlap CTA buttons

critical_code_review_comments: MobileTabBar dark glass implementation correct with proper backdrop-blur and border opacity
Gold accent (#C9A962) consistently applied to active states
Cookie consent properly positioned with pb-[76px] to avoid tab bar overlap
Responsive breakpoint (lg:1024px) correctly applied for tab bar visibility
HeroCurator uses items-center lg:items-end for proper vertical alignment per viewport
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile/tablet redesign complete and verified. MobileTabBar uses dark glass (bg-black/80) with gold active states (#C9A962). Hero content centered on mobile/tablet via items-center, bottom-aligned on desktop via lg:items-end. Cookie consent uses dark glass (bg-black/90) with gold Accept All. All floating buttons properly positioned above 68px tab bar. No overflow on any page at any viewport.
